title: 5 Demo Polish Changes: Testimonial, Headline, Process Proof, Phone, CTA Urgency

requirements.text: Update all testimonial references that mention 'Karen' to display 'TX Agent J.D. - 12 quotes first month' instead. Remove the name 'Karen' from all testimonial content across every testimonial component (TestimonialsSection, HoustonTestimonialsSection, ReevesAboutSection, and any other component displaying testimonials).

quotes: Testimonial: "TX Agent J.D. - 12 quotes first month" (remove Karen name)

acceptanceCriteria: No instance of the name 'Karen' appears anywhere in the rendered UI
At least one testimonial displays 'TX Agent J.D. - 12 quotes first month' as the attribution
All testimonial carousel/grid components are updated consistently

requirements.text: Change the hero section headline to 'Conroe Agents: Get 12+ Quotes/Month' and ensure it is the most prominent above-the-fold text in all hero components (HeroSection, HoustonHeroSection, ReevesHeroSection). The headline must be visible without scrolling on standard desktop and mobile viewports.

quotes: Hero Headline: "Conroe Agents: Get 12+ Quotes/Month" (above fold)

acceptanceCriteria: The headline 'Conroe Agents: Get 12+ Quotes/Month' is visible above the fold on desktop (1280px) and mobile (375px) without scrolling
The headline is the largest/most prominent text element in the hero section
All hero components display this updated headline

requirements.text: Add a 'Process Proof' section in the footer area (above or integrated into the footer) that displays 3 steps as visual screenshot placeholders with labels: 'Figma Design', 'Live Preview', and 'Conroe #1'. Use arrow connectors between steps to show the progression. The section heading should communicate a proven build process.

quotes: Process Proof: Add 3 screenshots footer: "Figma Design → Live Preview → Conroe #1"

acceptanceCriteria: A process proof section appears above or within the footer area on all public-facing pages
Three step cards are displayed labeled 'Figma Design', 'Live Preview', and 'Conroe #1'
Arrows or connectors visually link the three steps in order
Each step includes a screenshot placeholder image or representative visual
Section is responsive on mobile (stacks vertically) and desktop (horizontal row)

requirements.text: Replace every phone number displayed in the UI with (832) 555-1234. This includes the Header phone CTA, FloatingCallButton tel: href, ContactSection/ReevesContactSection business info, Footer/ReevesFooter/HoustonFooter contact details, StickyQuoteBar if it shows a phone, and any other component rendering a phone number. Also update the default fallback phone value in the useBusinessInfo hook.
acceptanceCriteria: No phone number other than (832) 555-1234 appears anywhere in the rendered UI
The FloatingCallButton tel: href points to tel:+18325551234
Header, footer, and contact section all display (832) 555-1234
The useBusinessInfo hook default fallback phone is set to (832) 555-1234

requirements.text: Update all primary CTA quote buttons (Get Free Quote, Get Quote, Submit Quote, etc.) to display the urgency text 'Get Conroe Site - 3 Spots Left Week'. Apply this to the main CTA button in the hero section, the header 'Get Free Quote' button, and any other prominent quote/CTA buttons in HoustonHeroSection, ReevesHeroSection, HoustonQuoteForm submit button, and EmotionalCloseSection CTAs.

quotes: CTA Urgency: Quote button → "Get Conroe Site - 3 Spots Left Week"

acceptanceCriteria: The primary CTA button in the hero section reads 'Get Conroe Site - 3 Spots Left Week'
The header 'Get Free Quote' button is updated to 'Get Conroe Site - 3 Spots Left Week'
All other prominent quote/CTA buttons display the urgency text
Form submit buttons may retain functional labels (e.g., 'Submit Request') but top-of-page CTA buttons show the urgency text

constraints: Do not modify any backend logic or data models — all changes are frontend-only
Do not alter immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve all existing admin panel functionality and routes
nonGoals: Changing the overall visual theme or color palette
Adding new backend endpoints or modifying the Motoko actor
Creating a real Google Maps or Calendly integration
Changing the admin dashboard or lead management features

required: Mockup screenshot of a Figma-style UI wireframe design for an insurance landing page, clean and minimal design board aesthetic (figma-design-screenshot.dim_600x400.png)
Mockup screenshot of a live browser preview showing an insurance agent website on a laptop screen (live-preview-screenshot.dim_600x400.png)
Mockup screenshot of a Google search results page showing '#1' ranking for a Conroe insurance query (conroe-number-one-screenshot.dim_600x400.png)
